title: The Steve Mod
description: A mod that has characters from youtube series like steve saga and rainbow quest. For example green steve, red steve, and rainbow steve
body: Hi welcome to my first ever mod. if you do see this thanks for visiting but if you download huge thanks. This mod was made from Mcreator, and it may not be too good. there are many things in it from being funny things like Sponge sword from spongebob steve to many different kinds of steves like green steve, rainbow steve, pickle steve, and more. The Steves can do a few things, like attacking darkness which spawn everywhere but are easy to kill. A few of the Steves you can tame so they would be on your side. There are a few bosses, for example: The one of blue flames it has 4 different stages tho so it is difficult, you may also be able to find herobrine somewhere in the world. There is also a dimension called the Steve Dimension but you need to use something called the Ignitor Of Realms which will ignite the portal nad allow you to go there
